name: frontmatter-colon-split-fix
description: Fix YAML frontmatter parsers that use manual line.split(':', 1) instead of yaml.safe_load(), which silently truncates values containing colons (URLs, ratios, quoted strings). Use when: (1) agent config validation scripts fail to read description fields containing URLs, (2) frontmatter parsers lose data after a colon in a value, (3) adding tests to audit existing colon-split parsers for truncation bugs.
